title: Alice's Digital Garden
description: Thoughts on web standards, accessibility, and the open web

items.title: Web Components in 2025: The Platform Wins
items.summary: After years of framework churn, web components have quietly become the interoperable standard everyone hoped for. Here's what changed.

items.title: ARIA Patterns You're Probably Using Wrong
items.summary: Common accessibility anti-patterns I keep seeing in production code, and how to fix them with native HTML instead.

items.title: Finally Understanding Cascade Layers
items.summary: A practical guide to @layer that goes beyond the basics. Real examples from migrating a design system.

items.title: In Praise of the Small Web
items.summary: Why I still believe in personal websites, webrings, and digital gardens in the age of algorithmic feeds.
